name: Discord
description: Send messages, manage channels, and interact with Discord servers via bot.

capabilities.name: send_message
capabilities.description: Send a message to a Discord channel

capabilities.name: list_channels
capabilities.description: List channels in a Discord server

capabilities.name: create_channel
capabilities.description: Create a new channel in a Discord server

capabilities.name: list_guilds
capabilities.description: List Discord servers the bot has access to

capabilities.name: get_user
capabilities.description: Get information about a Discord user

capabilities.name: create_dm
capabilities.description: Create a direct message channel with a user

capabilities.name: add_reaction
capabilities.description: Add an emoji reaction to a message

demo_actions.label: Send test message
demo_actions.description: Post a test message to a demo channel
